description: Botão de carga + menu de upload de condutores (P20_imagen3)
pre_capture_js: (() => { const trigger = document.querySelector("otto-web-tool-bar-toggle-button[data-cdk-menu-stack-id] button[data-qa-id='toolBarButtonToggle']"); if (!trigger) return; const menuId = trigger.getAttribute('aria-controls'); let menu = menuId ? document.getElementById(menuId) : document.querySelector("gs-menu[role='menu']"); if (!menu) { trigger.click(); menu = menuId ? document.getElementById(menuId) : document.querySelector("gs-menu[role='menu']"); } if (menu) menu.setAttribute('data-capture-anchor', 'upload-drivers-menu'); })();
